ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "question" TEXT /* The question asked in the survey */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The size of the sample population for the survey */,
  "survey_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the survey started */,
  "survey_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the survey ended */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* The current status of the survey (e.g., active, completed, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "response_category" INTEGER /* ID of the response category */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the sample population that chose this response */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* The number of participants who chose this response */,
  "response_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes provided by participants for this response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_response_category FOREIGN KEY ("response_category") REFERENCES response_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the response category (e.g., At least daily, Weekly) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the response category */,
  "category_order" INTEGER /* The order in which categories should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the participant responded to */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the participant */,
  "participant_age" INTEGER /* The age of the participant */,
  "participant_gender" TEXT /* The gender of the participant */,
  "participant_location" TEXT /* The location (city, state, country) of the participant */,
  "participant_ethnicity" TEXT /* The ethnicity of the participant */,
  "participant_occupation" TEXT /* The occupation of the participant */,
  "participant_education_level" TEXT /* The highest education level attained by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the report is based on */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* The name of the author of the report */,
  "report_department" TEXT /* The department or team that prepared the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
